speaker: speaker1
text: So , Paula , where are you from ?

speaker: speaker1
text: From Canada ? Where were you born ?

speaker: speaker1
text: When did you come to Los Angeles ?

speaker: speaker2
text: We moved here when I was fourteen .

speaker: speaker1
text: Did you go to school here ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I went to high school here , but I went to college in Texas .

speaker: speaker1
text: Did you get a job right after graduation ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , I traveled for a while in Europe after college , and then I lived in France .

speaker: speaker2
text: Let's see ... That was about six years ago .

speaker: speaker1
text: I bet that was interesting . What did you do there ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I studied French . Anyway ... that's enough about me.How about you ? Were you born in L . A . ?
